title: doit constitution.md frontmatter
description: Contract for the YAML frontmatter block at the top of a project's .doit/memory/constitution.md. Canonical source; kept in sync with platform-docs-site/tools/gen-data/schema/frontmatter.schema.json.

id.description: Must match the component's directory name.

icon.description: 2-4 uppercase chars/digits displayed on the component card.

dependencies.description: Component ids matching ^(app|platform)-... are linked on the site; other strings are rendered as plain text.
